datenschutz_content: The protection of your personal data is very important to me. In this privacy policy, I inform you about which data is collected, processed and stored on my website, as well as your rights regarding this data.
2. Collection and Storage of Personal Data
When visiting my website, the following data may be collected automatically:
• Referring URL (e.g., the page you came from)
• This data is anonymized and used only for statistical purposes and to improve the website. It cannot be traced back to you personally.

Personal data such as your name, email address or phone number is only collected if you provide it voluntarily, e.g., via the contact form. This data is used exclusively to process your request and is not passed on to third parties unless required by law.
My website uses cookies to analyze site usage and make your visit more user-friendly.
• Essential cookies: Necessary for the operation of the website.
• You can restrict or completely disable the use of cookies in your browser settings.
This website uses Umami, a privacy-friendly open-source web analytics service. Umami is hosted on my own server, meaning data is never shared with third parties at any time.

Umami does not use cookies and does not collect personal data. All recorded data (such as visited pages, browser used, operating system) is processed completely anonymously and is used exclusively to analyze the usage of my website and optimize it technically.

I work with advertising partners and affiliate programs. When you click on an affiliate link or an ad, third-party providers may set cookies or collect data to measure the success of their ads or sales.
For more information about the privacy policies of these partners, please visit their websites.
• Information about the data I have stored about you
• Deletion of your data, as far as legally permissible
• To exercise these rights, please contact me by email at roman.messmer@media4u.ch.
I use technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, loss or misuse.
This privacy policy will be updated as needed to meet legal requirements or to adapt to changes on the website.
